name: Resolving Conflicting Hearing Tests

mainEntity.name: What if audiometric test conflicts between employer and my doctor in Taylorsville?
mainEntity.text: What if audiometric test conflicts between employer and my doctor in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Submit both to Utah Labor Commission; independent medical exam (IME) often ordered to resolve discrepancies in hearing threshold determinations.

suggestedAnswer.text: Employer tests may understate loss; private audiograms provide counter-evidence. Taylorsville disputes common in unions; ALJs weigh credentials, timing. Retain originals, chain-of-custody. Legal reps force fair IMEs, preventing lowball ratings.[2][4]

description: Submit both to Utah Labor Commission; independent medical exam (IME) often ordered to resolve discrepancies in hearing threshold determinations.
